title: ctenopteris pseudonutans
intro: Ctenopteris pseudonutans, also known as False Nut Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris pseudonutans include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
